1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Lillestrøm municipality

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer from step 1

3.description: get quick-clay mapping polygons (kartleggingsomrade) — will be reduced by spatial join with municipality geometry

4.description: find parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons

5.description: get 1 km grid cells for the area

6.description: assign parcels-in-quick-clay to 1 km grid cells

7.description: count unique parcels per grid cell

8.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending
